text:
8aa. Clause (h) substituted by the Companies (Share Capital and Debentures) Third

--- PAGE 16 ---
Amendment Rules, 2016, w.e.f. 19-7-2016. Prior to its substitution, said clause read as
under :
"(h) where convertible securities are offered on a preferential basis with an option to apply for and
get equity shares allotted, the price of the resultant shares shall be determined beforehand on the basis
of a valuation report of a registered valuer and also complied with the provisions of section 62 of the
Act;"
section_title: 8aa. Clause (h) substituted by the Companies (Share Capital and Debentures) Third
